race.comment: EXTRAGALACTIC (16) gets in with the minimum weight and maps to enjoy a perfect run from the draw. She impressed at Caulfield two starts back before flashing home to finish within a length of TYCOON STAR in the Tobin Bronze here a fortnight ago. Peaking now and looks hard to hold out under the light weight. FLYING FOR FUN (13) was desperately unlucky not to win the Sangster, beaten a lip in a thrilling finish. Lloyd stays aboard and she's sure to be charging home strongly again. WA filly TALKANCO (15) was excellent in The Quokka, finishing less than a length off the red-hot Jigsaw. Gets a favourable weight pull and can run a big race. DESERT LIGHTNING (4) closed off well under a big weight behind RECON in the Hareeba Stakes at Mornington. He drops 4kg here and draws to settle much closer. Dangerous at odds. WATCHME WIN (5) is ultra-consistent and always gives his all, though the wide draw tests again.
